{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Archlord defensive construct
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]] will gift [[the Emperor]] an [[Archlord defensive construct]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s weapons were enhanced to the level of [[Archlord]] constructs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
